title: Aao Aao Ganjanan
lyrics:
Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Bhole Shankar Ke Putr Gajanan,
Gaura Maiya Ke Putr Gajanan,
Aake Bhakton Ke Man Ko Bhao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Riddhi Siddhi Ko Sang Mein Laana,
Gaura Maiya Ko Bhool Na Jaana,
Aane Mein Der Na Lagao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Hum Sabke Pyare Gajanan,
Sab Devon Se Nyare Gajanan,
Aake Kirtan Mein Ras Barsao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhaon

title: Ghar Mein Padharo
lyrics:
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Riddhi Siddhi Leke Aaro Ganaraaja, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Ram Ji Aana, Lakshaman Ji Aana,
Sang Mein Laana Sita Maiya, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Brahma Ji Aana, Vishnu Ji Aaana,
Bhole Shanker Ji Ko Le Aana, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Lakshmi Ji Aana, Gauri Ji Aana,
Saraswati Maiya Ko Le Aana, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Vighna Ko Harana, Mangal Karanaa,
Kaaraj Shubh Kar Jaana, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

title: Godi Mein Utha Lo
lyrics:
Godi Mein Utha Lo Meri Ma, Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ka Chota Sa Maatha
Tilak Laga Do Meree Maan Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ka Chota Sa Gala Hai
Haar Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ke Chote-Chote Haath Hain
Kangan Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Meri Gajaanan Ke Chote-Chote Paon Hain
Paayal Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ke Chote-Chote Ang Hain
Peetaambar Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Meri Gajaanan Ka Chota Sa Mukh Hai
Modak Khila Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Godi Mein Utha Lo Meri Ma, Gajaanan Chote Hain

title: Jai Ganesh
lyrics:
Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva
Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva

Ek Dant Dayavant, Chaar Bhuja Dhaari
Maathe Pe Sindhoor Sohe, Muse Ki Savari
Paan Chadhe, Phul Chadhe, Aur Chadhe Meva
Ladduan Ka Bhog Lage, Sant Kare Seva

Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva

Andhan Ko Aankh Det, Kodhin Ko Kaaya
Baanjhan Ko Putra Det, Nirdhan Ko Maaya
Surya Shaam Sharan Aye, Safalki Je Seva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva

Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata jaaki Parvati, Pita Mahadeva

title: Rakh Laaj Meri
lyrics:
Rakh Laaj Meri Ganpati,
Apni Sharan Mein Lijiye
Kar Aaj Mangal Ganpati,
Apni Kripa Ab Kijiye

Siddhi Vinayak Duhkh Haran,
Santap Haari Sukh Karan
Karoon Prarthna Main Nitt Prati,
Vardaan Mangal Dijiye

Teri Daya, Teri Kripa,
Hey Nath Hum Maange Sada
Tere Dhyan Mein Khove Mati,
Pranam Mam Ab Lijie

Karte Pratham Tav Vandana,
Tera Naam Hai Duhkh Bhanjana
Karna Prabhu Meri Shubh Gati,
Ab To Sharan Me Lijiye

Rakh Laaj Meri Ganpati,
Apni Sharan Mein Lijiye
Kar Aaj Mangal Ganpati,
Apni Kripa Ab Kijiye
